description: This file defines an AWS CDK construct class 'IdentityProvider' that sets up a Cognito User Pool and User Pool Client with specific attributes and OAuth configurations, and exposes identity details.

classes.name: IdentityProvider
classes.description: A CDK construct that creates and configures a Cognito User Pool and User Pool Client, and provides identity details.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes the IdentityProvider construct, creating a user pool, user pool client, and setting identity details.
